query: SELECT id, title, CASE WHEN content LIKE '%editpdf.online%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_old_domain FROM blog_posts WHERE content LIKE '%editpdf.online%' ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4AvtuQasrcUbqPZ.root --database HUwJ6fxw58gKVZz5QkmFWk --execute SELECT id, title, CASE WHEN content LIKE '%editpdf.online%' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_old_domain FROM blog_posts WHERE content LIKE '%editpdf.online%' ORDER BY id;
